items.title: Venn diagram of entropies (information decomposition)
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  hx["H(X)"] --> uniqueX["H(X|Y) unique to X"]
  hx --> miBlock["I(X;Y) shared"]
  hy["H(Y)"] --> uniqueY["H(Y|X) unique to Y"]
  hy --> miBlock
  joint["H(X,Y)"] --> uniqueX
  joint --> uniqueY
  joint --> miBlock
items.caption: H(X) splits into unique uncertainty H(X|Y) plus shared information I(X; Y). The same shared region sits inside H(Y). Joint entropy H(X, Y) = H(X|Y) + H(Y|X) + I(X; Y).

items.title: From joint PMF to MI via KL divergence
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  joint["Joint P(X,Y)"] -->|"compare to"| product["P(X) * P(Y)"]
  product --> kl["D_KL joint || product"]
  kl --> mi["I(X;Y)"]
items.caption: Mutual information equals KL divergence between the true joint distribution and the independence baseline P(X)P(Y). Zero divergence means independence.
